summary: This week's strongest cross-platform opportunity is Kojic Acid Serum, which has achieved 1,600% view growth on TikTok, 7.4M units sold on TikTok Shop, and surging Google search volume for K-beauty hyperpigmentation solutions — making it the clearest triple-platform winner of the week. Portable Neck Fans and Sauna Blankets are the other two triple-platform aligned products, with neck fans exploding in real-time alongside July heatwaves and sauna blankets sustaining a multi-year Google + TikTok + Amazon climb that shows no sign of slowing. Dropshippers should prioritize all three of these aligned items immediately, with Kojic Acid Serum and Portable Neck Fans offering the highest urgency given their explosive, time-sensitive demand signals this week.
